payroll_deadline.description: A timestamp that is the deadline for the payroll to be run in order for employees to be paid on time.  If payroll has not been run by the deadline, a prepare request will update both the check date and deadline to reflect the soonest employees can be paid and the deadline by which the payroll must be run in order for said check date to be met.
payroll_deadline.title: Payroll-Deadline-Type

check_date.description: The date on which employees will be paid for the payroll.
check_date.title: Payroll-Check-Date-Type

processed.description: Whether or not the payroll has been successfully processed. Note that processed payrolls cannot be updated. Additionally, a payroll is not guaranteed to be processed just because the payroll deadline has passed. Late payrolls are not uncommon. Conversely, users may choose to run payroll before the payroll deadline.
processed.title: Payroll-Processed-Type

processed_date.description: The date at which the payroll was processed. Null if the payroll isn't processed yet.
processed_date.title: Payroll-Processed-Date-Type

calculated_at.description: A timestamp of the last valid payroll calculation. Null if there isn't a valid calculation.
calculated_at.title: Payroll-Calculated-At-Type

company_uuid.description: The UUID of the company for the payroll.
company_uuid.title: Payroll-Company-Uuid-Type

off_cycle.description: Indicates whether the payroll is an off-cycle payroll
off_cycle.title: Payroll-Off-Cycle-Type

off_cycle_reason.description: The off-cycle reason. Only included for off-cycle payrolls.
off_cycle_reason.title: Off-Cycle-Reason-Type

auto_pilot.description: Indicates whether the payroll is an auto pilot payroll
auto_pilot.title: Auto-Pilot-Type

external.description: Indicates whether the payroll is an external payroll
external.title: Payroll-External-Type

final_termination_payroll.description: Indicates whether the payroll is the final payroll for a terminated employee. Only included for off-cycle payrolls.
final_termination_payroll.title: Payroll-Final-Termination-Payroll-Type

withholding_pay_period.description: The payment schedule tax rate the payroll is based on. Only included for off-cycle payrolls.
withholding_pay_period.title: Payroll-Withholding-Pay-Period-Type

skip_regular_deductions.description: Block regular deductions and contributions for this payroll.  Only included for off-cycle payrolls.
skip_regular_deductions.title: Payroll-Skip-Regular-Deductions-Type

fixed_withholding_rate.description: Enable taxes to be withheld at the IRS's required rate of 22% for federal income taxes. State income taxes will be taxed at the state's supplemental tax rate. Otherwise, we'll sum the entirety of the employee's wages and withhold taxes on the entire amount at the rate for regular wages. Only included for off-cycle payrolls.
fixed_withholding_rate.title: Payroll-Fixed-Withholding-Rate-Type

start_date.description: The start date, inclusive, of the pay period.

end_date.description: The start date, inclusive, of the pay period.

pay_schedule_uuid.description: The UUID of the pay schedule for the payroll.

payroll_status_meta.description: Information about the payroll's status and expected dates

cancellable.description: true if the payroll may be cancelled.

expected_check_date.description: The date an employee will be paid if the payroll is submitted now.

initial_check_date.description: The normal check date for the associated pay period.

expected_debit_time.description: The time the employer's account will be debited if the payroll is submitted now.

initial_debit_cutoff_time.description: Payroll must be submitted at or before this time to avoid late payroll.

payroll_status_meta.title: Payroll-Payroll-Status-Meta-Type

company_debit.description: The total company debit for the payroll.

net_pay_debit.description: The total company net pay for the payroll.

tax_debit.description: The total tax debit for the payroll.

reimbursement_debit.description: The total reimbursement debit for the payroll.

child_support_debit.description: The total child support debit for the payroll.

reimbursements.description: The total reimbursements for the payroll.

net_pay.description: The net pay amount for the payroll.

gross_pay.description: The gross pay amount for the payroll.

employee_bonuses.description: The total employee bonuses amount for the payroll.

employee_commissions.description: The total employee commissions amount for the payroll.

employee_cash_tips.description: The total employee cash tips amount for the payroll.

employee_paycheck_tips.description: The total employee paycheck tips amount for the payroll.

additional_earnings.description: The total additional earnings amount for the payroll.

owners_draw.description: The total owner's draw for the payroll.

check_amount.description: The total check amount for the payroll.

employer_taxes.description: The total amount of employer paid taxes for the payroll.

employee_taxes.description: The total amount of employee paid taxes for the payroll.

benefits.description: The total amount of company contributed benefits for the payroll.

employee_benefits_deductions.description: The total amount of employee deducted benefits for the payroll.

imputed_pay.description: The total amount of imputed pay for the payroll.

deferred_payroll_taxes.description: The total amount of payroll taxes deferred for the payroll, such as allowed by the CARES act.

other_deductions.description: The total amount of deductions for the payroll.

payment_speed_changed.description: Only applicable when a payroll is moved to four day processing instead of fast ach.

original_check_date.description: Original check date when fast ach applies.

original_debit_date.description: Original debit date when fast ach applies.

reason.description: The reason why the payroll is moved to four day.

payment_speed_changed.title: Payroll-Payment-Speed-Changed-Type

created_at.description: Datetime for when the resource was created.
created_at.title: Created-At-Type

submission_blockers.description: Only included for processed or calculated payrolls

items.description: A blocker that prevents payment submission.

blocker_type.description: The type of blocker that's blocking the payment submission.

blocker_name.description: The name of the submission blocker.

unblock_type.description: The type of unblock option for the submission blocker.

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option.

metadata.description: Additional data associated with the unblock option.

unblock_options.description: The available options to unblock a submission blocker.

selected_option.description: The unblock option that's been selected to resolve the submission blocker.

status.description: The status of the submission blocker.

items.title: Payroll-Submission-Blocker-Type

submission_blockers.title: Payroll-Submission-Blockers-Type

items.description: A blocker that prevents payment crediting.

blocker_type.description: The type of blocker that's blocking the payment from being credited.

blocker_name.description: The name of the credit blocker.

oneOf.description: Unblock option to resolve a credit blocker by submitting a wire transfer

unblock_type.description: The type of unblock option for the credit blocker

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

wire_in_amount.description: The amount to be wired in (decimal string)

wire_in_deadline.description: Deadline for the wire transfer to be received

wire_in_request_uuid.description: UUID of the wire in request

oneOf.title: Payroll-Credit-Blocker-Unblock-Option-Submit-Wire

oneOf.description: Unblock option to resolve a credit blocker by submitting a bank screenshot

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

bank_account_last_four_digits.description: Last 4 digits of the bank account number for the bank screenshot RFI

oneOf.title: Payroll-Credit-Blocker-Unblock-Option-Submit-Bank-Screenshot

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

oneOf.title: Payroll-Credit-Blocker-Unblock-Option-Respond-To-High-Risk-Fraud-Rfi

oneOf.description: Unblock option to resolve a credit blocker by waiting for reverse wire

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

reverse_wire_detail_id.description: ID of the reverse wire detail

bank_account_last_four_digits.description: Last 4 digits of the bank account number for the reverse wire

submit_wire.description: Unblock option to resolve a credit blocker by submitting a wire transfer

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

wire_in_deadline.description: Deadline for the wire transfer to be received

wire_in_request_uuid.description: UUID of the wire in request

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

bank_account_last_four_digits.description: Last 4 digits of the bank account number for the bank screenshot RFI

submit_bank_screenshot.title: Payroll-Credit-Blocker-Unblock-Option-Submit-Bank-Screenshot

respond_to_high_risk_fraud_rfi.description: Unblock option to resolve a credit blocker by responding to high risk fraud RFI

unblock_type.description: The type of unblock option for the credit blocker

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

respond_to_high_risk_fraud_rfi.title: Payroll-Credit-Blocker-Unblock-Option-Respond-To-High-Risk-Fraud-Rfi

wait_for_reverse_wire.description: Unblock option to resolve a credit blocker by waiting for reverse wire

unblock_type.description: The type of unblock option for the credit blocker

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

reverse_wire_detail_id.description: ID of the reverse wire detail

bank_account_last_four_digits.description: Last 4 digits of the bank account number for the reverse wire

wait_for_reverse_wire.title: Payroll-Credit-Blocker-Unblock-Option-Wait-For-Reverse-Wire
